name: Can I get free help if harmed by lawyer's AI mistake?
description: Bar funds or pro bono; check eligibility.

mainEntity.name: Can I get free help if harmed by lawyer's AI mistake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Bar funds or pro bono; check eligibility.
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly via bar legal aid or malpractice funds. Context: Some states have client protection; pro bono for low-income. Key factors: Income eligibility, provable harm. Practical guidance: Contact state bar fund, legal aid society. Contingency lawyers common.
